---
title: "IFCD0210 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd0210, backlog]
toc: true
number-sections: false
format:
  html
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: true
---

<style>

.heatMap th { background:  #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(3) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(6) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
th, td {
  padding: 8px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

tr:hover {background-color:  #f4f4f4;}

</style>

![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

<div class="heatMap">

::: {.column-page-right}

##  ``Sprint#17/18: graphQL & noSQL, openCode AI`` (April 2026)

| # | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
|  **17**  | 57 | 09/04/2026 | - Plan Sprint#17/18 </br> - <s>Coding with AI, **openCode**, desktop IDE: </br> (1) OpenCode desktop IDE  </br> (2) Tools and skills </br> (3) Test api rest with commands: `api.ts` </br></br>  - `ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc`: **v6.2**, school `CREATE` </br> (0) form  for create new `School`  </br> (1) logic for `School`, new school and assign apartment  </br>  (3) map with schools</s>  </br></br>  ++ **GraphQL**: </br> (1) Cloud: AWS AppSync Server (+ WS/SSE)  </br> (2) Spring Boot Starter GraphQL Server </br> (3) React Client (Middleware GraphQL)  </br> </br> ++ NoSQL DynamoDB: how to relate items? </br> ++ Person: Student <-> Teacher? Course? PK?  | - <s>[api tools](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/9c4d459744d95a310874f4d64cc7900b07fc7583/ApartmentPredictor-React/.opencode/tools/api.ts){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [Rules](https://opencode.ai/docs/rules/){.external target='_blank'} / - [Skills](https://opencode.ai/docs/skills/){.external target='_blank'} / - [Tools](https://opencode.ai/docs/tools/){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [dataModel-refactor: repo](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor){.external target='_blank'}   </br>  [(1) datamodel-refactor.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/datamodel-refactor.md){.external target='_blank'}    </br>  [(2) data-layer-options.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/data-layer-options.md){.external target='_blank'}   </br>  [(3) refactor-plan-implement.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/refactor-plan-implement.md){.external target='_blank'}   </br> [(4) refactor-plan-review.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/refactor-plan-review.md){.external target='_blank'}    </br> - [React Best Practices by Vercel: skill](https://mcpservers.org/agent-skills/vercel/react-best-practices){.external target='_blank'} </s></br></br>  - [AWS AppSync](https://aws.amazon.com/appsync/){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [GraphQL](https://graphql.org/){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Why invent something new?](https://legacy.reactjs.org/blog/2015/05/01/graphql-introduction.html#why-invent-something-new){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [What is GraphQL?](https://hasura.io/learn/graphql/intro-graphql/what-is-graphql/){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/graphql-aws-spring.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> ![](https://graphql-engine-cdn.hasura.io/learn-hasura/assets/graphql-react/graphql-on-http.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br></br> - [Spring Boot for GraphQL](https://spring.io/projects/spring-graphql){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [React query for GraphQL](https://tanstack.com/query/v5/docs/framework/react/graphql#type-safety-and-code-generation){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Apollo Client](https://www.apollographql.com/docs/react/data/queries){.external target='_blank'} |
|   | 58 | 10/04/2026 |  - <s>Java Spring Boot: </br> (0) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: **v7** </br> (1) `Renovation` domain </s> </br></br>  - Spring Boot AWS `personNoSQL` Sandbox: </br> (0) DynamoDB SDK v2.x dependency  </br> (1) **noSql: pK and sK** </br> (2) `Teacher` / `Student` /`Person` document/`item` (gsheet) </br> (3) Enhanced client </br> (4) `noSqlPerson` **how to relate items?** Pk? Social Club?  </br> (5) `map` field depending on `sortkey` </br> (6) `Map<String, Object> extraAttributes`  </br> </br> ++ Architectures: </br>(1) Spring Boot GraphQL + DyanmoDB + React     </br>(2) React + Apollo + AWS (AppSync, DynamoDB)     </br> (3)  Spring Boot Client AppSync + AWS          |     - [noSqlPerson: 46c778](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/46c7780cb7bfaefd3aa8efd35ce7db94ea0d1652){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [AWS SDK v2 Enhanced Client: Java](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/blob/master/doc/AWS%20SDK%20v2%20Enhanced%20Client.md){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Map approach](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/blob/master/doc/Map_approach.md){.external target='_blank'}  </br></br> - [dynamoDB-enhanced](https://github.com/aws/aws-sdk-java-v2/blob/master/services-custom/dynamodb-enhanced/README.md){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [dynamoDB-enhanced: common-primitive-operations](https://github.com/aws/aws-sdk-java-v2/blob/master/services-custom/dynamodb-enhanced/README.md#common-primitive-operations){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Postman](https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/7473960/2sBXinGprw){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [SpreadSheet NoSql Renovations](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1UYF7O0Qzgeu_EFJRh7fej04a0yhB2WTI18R1ccxcaqw/edit?usp=sharing){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [SpreadSheet NoSql person](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1UYVKKlaXtwYl7nI-MfBhrRZpycEDlwbtR0srz7UiSLg/edit?usp=sharing){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br>  ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/refs/heads/master/doc/screenshots/2026-03-31_10-51.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/refs/heads/master/doc/screenshots/2026-03-31_10-30.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}   ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/refs/heads/master/doc/screenshots/2026-03-31_10-47.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </BR> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/ARCHITECTURES-appsync.jpg){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  |
|   |    | | |
|  **#18** | 59 | 13/04/2026 |    - Spring Boot AWS `personNoSQL` Sandbox: </br> (1) noSql: pK and sK </br> (2) `Teacher` / `Student` /`Person` document/`item` (gsheet) </br>  (3) `noSqlPerson` how to relate items? Pk? Social Club? Programming courses? Catalonia elementary schools?</br> (4) Defining **unique-table** </br>  (5) Spring Boot **graphQL** </br> (6) Test with GraphiQL **Playground** / Postman </br> </br> ++ `Microservices` or `Monolith` ? Modulith | - [noSqlPerson: 46c778](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/46c7780cb7bfaefd3aa8efd35ce7db94ea0d1652){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [noSqlPerson: e030a1](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/e030a180700e7f69dcfbe9be13419d32529a9e55){.external target='_blank'}   </br> - [SpreadSheet NoSql person](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1UYVKKlaXtwYl7nI-MfBhrRZpycEDlwbtR0srz7UiSLg/edit?usp=sharing){.external target='_blank'}  </br></br> - [Choosing the Right DynamoDB Partition Key](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/database/choosing-the-right-dynamodb-partition-key/){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [What is a NoSQL database?](https://www.ibm.com/think/topics/nosql-databases){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Key Concepts](https://www.dynamodbguide.com/key-concepts/){.external target='_blank'} </br>  </br> - [Spring for GraphQL](https://spring.io/projects/spring-graphql){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Getting started with Spring for GraphQL](https://www.graphql-java.com/tutorials/getting-started-with-spring-boot){.external target='_blank'}  </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/graphql-i.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} |
|   | 60 | 14/04/2026 |  - Spring Boot AWS `personNoSQL` Sandbox: </br> (1) noSql : pK and sK </br> (2) `Teacher` / `Student` /`Person` document/`item` (gsheet) </br>  (3) Create Programming Courses: GraphQL + noSQL DynamodDB  </br> (4) query, mutation, subscription </br> (5) **create a subscription**: `createPerson`  </br></br>  - Reactive Programming: `Webflux`: `Flux`, `Sink`, `Publisher`, ... </br> - **Pub-Sub** pattern   | - [noSqlPerson: 5ec944](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/5ec944f5c8a8244934d8f501ec4029ef0644311c){.external target='_blank'}   </br>  - [Adding GraphQL Subscriptions](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/blob/master/doc/SUBSCRIPTION_GUIDE.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [personNoSql + graphQL](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/blob/master/doc/personNoSql_graphQL.md){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [How shema works](https://graphql.org/learn/schema/){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/refs/heads/master/doc/screenshots/graphql-i-5.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  </br> - [Web on Reactive Stack](https://docs.spring.io/spring-framework/reference/web-reactive.html){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/pub-sub.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}|
|   |    | | |
|   |   61 | 16/04/2026   | - Coding with AI, **openCode**, desktop IDE: </br> (1) OpenCode desktop IDE  </br> (2) Tools and skills </br> (3) Test api rest with commands: `api.ts` </br></br>  - `ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc`: **v6.1**, Middleware/Data Refactor guide </br> </br> - Spring Boot AI: **agents** | - [api tools](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/9c4d459744d95a310874f4d64cc7900b07fc7583/ApartmentPredictor-React/.opencode/tools/api.ts){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [Rules](https://opencode.ai/docs/rules/){.external target='_blank'} / - [Skills](https://opencode.ai/docs/skills/){.external target='_blank'} / - [Tools](https://opencode.ai/docs/tools/){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [dataModel-refactor: repo](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor){.external target='_blank'}   </br>  [(1) datamodel-refactor.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/datamodel-refactor.md){.external target='_blank'}    </br>  [(2) data-layer-options.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/data-layer-options.md){.external target='_blank'}   </br>  [(3) refactor-plan-implement.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/refactor-plan-implement.md){.external target='_blank'}   </br> [(4) refactor-plan-review.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/refactor-plan-review.md){.external target='_blank'}    </br> - [React Best Practices by Vercel: skill](https://mcpservers.org/agent-skills/vercel/react-best-practices){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [Spring Boot AI vs OpenCode](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/OpenCode_vs_SpringBoot%20AIAgents_%20Orchestration.md){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [OpenCode Multi-Agent](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/OpenCodeMulti-Agent.md){.external target='_blank'}|
|   |  62  | 17/04/2026 | - Coding with AI, **openCode**, desktop IDE: </br> (1) OpenCode desktop IDE  </br> (2) Tools and skills </br> (3) Test api rest with commands: `api.ts` </br></br>  - `ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc`: **v6.2**, school `CREATE` </br> (0) form  for create new `School`  </br> (1) logic for `School`, new school and assign apartment  </br>  <s>(3) map with schools </s></br></br> <s>- Java Spring Boot: </br> (0) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: **v7** </br> (1) `Renovation` domain </s> </br></br>   | - [dataModel-refactor: repo at refactor-middleware-data-2](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/refactor-middleware-data-2/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor){.external target='_blank'}   </br>  [(1) datamodel-refactor.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/refactor-middleware-data-2/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/datamodel-refactor.md){.external target='_blank'}    </br>  [(2) data-layer-options.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/refactor-middleware-data-2/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/data-layer-options.md){.external target='_blank'}   </br>  [(3) refactor-plan-implement.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/refactor-middleware-data-2/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/refactor-plan-implement.md){.external target='_blank'}   </br> [(4) refactor-plan-review.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/refactor-middleware-data-2/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/refactor-plan-review.md){.external target='_blank'}    </br></br> - [OpenCode:folders](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/openCode-folders.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/opencode-createSchool.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> - [ApartmentPrediction-React at refactor-middleware-data-2: 34f17ec](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/34f17ec4a81bd9704ab075956e10c179d798c551){.external target='_blank'} |
: Backlog Sprint#17/18 April 2026 {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,55,39]"}
:::

</div>

::: {.callout-note}
- `---------` <s>topic pending</s>
- `-` topic done in class
- `++` new topic not planned
:::
